error.signature: BOD: Brown-out detected, system held in reset

verdict.summary: Supply voltage dropped below brown-out detection threshold.

dead_ends.why_fails: System runs at unstable voltage, causing random data corruption.

dead_ends.action: Lower BOD threshold below safe operating voltage
dead_ends.why_fails: Flash writes and EEPROM operations require minimum voltage.

workarounds.action: Improve power supply decoupling with capacitors
workarounds.how: Add 100nF ceramic + 10uF electrolytic on VCC pins

workarounds.action: Implement graceful shutdown on power-fail interrupt
workarounds.how: Use ADC to monitor VCC; save state to EEPROM before power loss
